conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?

Exhausted. I've been working a lot of overtime to get everything done on time, and my social life is basically non-existent. I just want to sit on the couch and watch Netflix without thinking about spreadsheets for five minutes.
You mentioned being exhausted—how has that been affecting your sleep?

I'm getting maybe four or five hours a night. I wake up in the middle of the night and just lie there, thinking about everything I need to do tomorrow. It's like my brain is still on the clock even when I'm asleep.
You mentioned just wanting to watch Netflix—do you find you're still enjoying the shows you watch, or is it more just something to pass the time?
Honestly? It’s just background noise. I’m not really paying attention to the plot or the characters. I’m just staring at the screen, thinking about work or bills.
When you're lying awake at night thinking about everything, what kind of thoughts tend to come up?
Just the usual stuff: bills, rent, work projects. I'm worried about making ends meet, and I know I’m not doing great at it. It’s just a lot of pressure, you know?
You mentioned feeling worried about making ends meet—how does that pressure affect how you see yourself?
It makes me feel like I’m failing. Like I’m not good enough to make it work. I know it’s not rational, but it feels like if I can’t even get my own life together, what’s the point?
When you say "what's the point," what does that feel like for you?
It feels like the whole thing is just pointless. Like I'm just spinning my wheels and getting nowhere. It’s a pretty bleak feeling, to be honest.
You mentioned that things feel pointless - when did that start feeling this strong?
I don't know, maybe a few months ago? It just crept up on me. I used to think I was just stressed, but now it feels like this is just the new normal.
You mentioned this feeling of things being pointless has become your new normal—how does that affect your outlook on the future?
Honestly? I don't really think about the future anymore. I'm just trying to get through the next week. If I don't think about it, maybe it'll magically get better.
When you say nothing matters, what parts of life feel most empty lately?
Everything feels empty. Work, social media, even my hobbies. It’s all just noise. I feel like I’m just going through the motions, but there’s no real connection to anything.
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?

I don't know. Just more of the same, probably. Just trying to survive until I can take a break. Maybe eventually things will turn around and I'll feel like I'm moving forward again, but right now... I just don't see it happening.
